stemHtml: ATC reports to G-ABCD 'Radar Identifcation is lost'. The correct readback is...

options.a: 'Identification lost, G-ABCD' - and turn off transponder to avoid confusion.
options.b: 'Roger G-ABCD' - and turn off transponder to avoid confusion.
options.c: 'Identification lost G-ABCD' - and don't do anything. Standby and wait for further instructions for separation.
options.d: 'Roger G-ABCD' - and don't do anything. Standby and wait for further instructions for separation.
